Tooltip_PIP_PortableLabFridge: A portable fridge unit designed for biological specimen storage. Installs into vehicle trunk area. Supports fridge and freezer modes. Drains vehicle battery when active.
Tooltip_PIP_PortableLabMicrowave: A portable microwave unit for general-purpose heating. Installs into vehicle trunk area. Timer-based operation. Drains vehicle battery when active.
